name: Red Candy Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except food coloring and apples in a saucepan.
2. Cook until the mixture spins a thread or until candy stays on apple. The mixture will be thick.
3. Add food coloring to achieve desired color.
4. Insert a stick into each apple and dip into the mixture.
5. Place the dipped apples on a well-greased cookie sheet.
6. Allow the apples to dry completely.
7. Store in a covered container or wrap with parchment paper or greased wrap.
8. Using Gala, Paula Red, or any other firm baking apples is recommended for the best results.
9. This recipe produces candy apples similar to those found at the State Fair without cinnamon flavoring.
